        "# Weight Management Prediction and Visualization\n",

        "# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n",
        "\"\"\"Modularized weight-management prediction and visualization workflow.\n",
        "\n",
        "Originally generated from the Colab notebook:\n",
        "https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1MHgWQuVGf7e8j03LcQJUpJy_2V-0jwgG\n",
        "\n",
        "Target spreadsheet:\n",
        "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1XvlpHJAU5kfVj0ikGpsic5KgSzQpledIv0xyPBzW9t0/edit?usp=sharing\n",
        "\"\"\"\n",
        "\n",
        "from __future__ import annotations\n",
        "\n",
        "import io\n",
        "import os\n",
        "import random\n",
        "import subprocess\n",
        "import sys\n",
        "from datetime import datetime, timedelta\n",
        "from typing import Any\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def install_required_libraries() -> None:\n",
        "    \"\"\"Install the same libraries installed by the original Colab workflow.\"\"\"\n",
        "    subprocess.run(\n",
        "        [\n",
        "            sys.executable,\n",
        "            \"-m\",\n",
        "            \"pip\",\n",
        "            \"install\",\n",
        "            \"tensorflow\",\n",
        "            \"scikit-learn\",\n",
        "            \"pandas\",\n",
        "            \"--quiet\",\n",
        "        ],\n",
        "        check=True,\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def import_runtime_dependencies() -> dict[str, Any]:\n",
        "    \"\"\"Import third-party dependencies after the install step.\"\"\"\n",
        "    import joblib\n",
        "    import matplotlib.cm as cm\n",
        "    import matplotlib.colors as mcolors\n",
        "    import matplotlib.dates as mdates\n",
        "    import matplotlib.patches as patches\n",
        "    import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "    import pandas as pd\n",
        "    import requests\n",
        "    import seaborn as sns\n",
        "    from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split\n",
        "    from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler\n",
        "    from tensorflow.keras.callbacks import EarlyStopping\n",
        "    from tensorflow.keras.layers import Dense, Input\n",
        "    from tensorflow.keras.models import Sequential, load_model\n",
        "    from tensorflow.keras.optimizers import Adam\n",
        "    import random\n",
        "    import numpy as np\n",
        "    import tensorflow as tf\n",
        "\n",
        "    random.seed(42)\n",
        "    np.random.seed(42)\n",
        "    tf.keras.utils.set_random_seed(42)\n",
        "\n",
        "    return {\n",
        "        \"joblib\": joblib,\n",
        "        \"cm\": cm,\n",
        "        \"mcolors\": mcolors,\n",
        "        \"mdates\": mdates,\n",
        "        \"patches\": patches,\n",
        "        \"plt\": plt,\n",
        "        \"pd\": pd,\n",
        "        \"requests\": requests,\n",
        "        \"sns\": sns,\n",
        "        \"train_test_split\": train_test_split,\n",
        "        \"StandardScaler\": StandardScaler,\n",
        "        \"EarlyStopping\": EarlyStopping,\n",
        "        \"Dense\": Dense,\n",
        "        \"Input\": Input,\n",
        "        \"Sequential\": Sequential,\n",
        "        \"load_model\": load_model,\n",
        "        \"Adam\": Adam,\n",
        "    }\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "DATA_URL = (\n",
        "    \"https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/\"\n",
        "    \"1yvuXyq2G7UTUd62s1iuuMNHoZ-P7Okpn42MuAW7Z1eg/export?format=csv\"\n",
        ")\n",
        "MODEL_PATH = \"model_final.keras\"\n",
        "SCALER_PATH = \"scaler.pkl\"\n",
        "FEATURE_COLUMNS = [\"Year\", \"Month\", \"Day\", \"Weekday\", \"DaysLived\"]\n",
        "DATE_OF_BIRTH = datetime(1999, 1, 20)\n",
        "TARGET_WEIGHT = 74.4\n",
        "\n",
        "def load_and_preprocess_data(deps: dict[str, Any]):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Load spreadsheet data and perform the original preprocessing steps.\"\"\"\n",
        "    pd = deps[\"pd\"]\n",
        "    requests = deps[\"requests\"]\n",
        "\n",
        "    response = requests.get(DATA_URL)\n",
        "    response.raise_for_status()\n",
        "    data = pd.read_csv(io.StringIO(response.text), on_bad_lines=\"skip\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    length_of_data = len(data)\n",
        "    print(\"The length of the data is:\", length_of_data)\n",
        "    data.head()\n",
        "\n",
        "    data[\"Date\"] = pd.to_datetime(data[\"Date\"])\n",
        "    data[\"Weight\"] = data[\"Weighed\"].str.extract(r\"(\\d+\\.?\\d*)\").astype(float)\n",
        "    data.drop(columns=[\"Weighed\"], inplace=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "    return data, length_of_data\n",
        "\n",
        "def prepare_training_data(data, deps: dict[str, Any]):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Normalize features, split the dataset, and persist the scaler.\"\"\"\n",
        "    StandardScaler = deps[\"StandardScaler\"]\n",
        "    train_test_split = deps[\"train_test_split\"]\n",
        "    joblib = deps[\"joblib\"]\n",
        "\n",
        "    scaler = StandardScaler()\n",
        "    features = scaler.fit_transform(data[FEATURE_COLUMNS])\n",
        "    labels = data[\"Weight\"].values\n",
        "\n",
        "    train_features, test_features, train_labels, test_labels = train_test_split(\n",
        "        features,\n",
        "        labels,\n",
        "        test_size=0.2,\n",
        "        random_state=42,\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    joblib.dump(scaler, SCALER_PATH)\n",
        "    return train_features, test_features, train_labels, test_labels\n",
        "\n",
        "def build_model(input_feature_count: int, deps: dict[str, Any]):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Build a compact neural network suited to the small weight dataset.\"\"\"\n",
        "    Sequential = deps[\"Sequential\"]\n",
        "    Dense = deps[\"Dense\"]\n",
        "    Input = deps[\"Input\"]\n",
        "    Adam = deps[\"Adam\"]\n",
        "\n",
        "    model = Sequential(\n",
        "        [\n",
        "            Input(shape=(input_feature_count,)),\n",
        "            Dense(16, activation=\"relu\"),\n",
        "            Dense(8, activation=\"relu\"),\n",
        "            Dense(1),\n",
        "        ]\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    model.compile(\n",
        "        optimizer=Adam(learning_rate=0.01),\n",
        "        loss=\"huber\",\n",
        "    )\n",
        "    return model\n",
        "\n",
        "def train_evaluate_and_save_model(\n",
        "    model,\n",
        "    train_features,\n",
        "    train_labels,\n",
        "    test_features,\n",
        "    test_labels,\n",
        "    length_of_data: int,\n",
        "    deps: dict[str, Any],\n",
        ") -> None:\n",
        "    \"\"\"Train, evaluate, save, verify, and reload the model as before.\"\"\"\n",
        "    EarlyStopping = deps[\"EarlyStopping\"]\n",
        "    load_model = deps[\"load_model\"]\n",
        "\n",
        "    early_stopping = EarlyStopping(\n",
        "        monitor=\"val_loss\",\n",
        "        patience=25,\n",
        "        min_delta=0.005,\n",
        "        restore_best_weights=True,\n",
        "    )\n",
        "    model.fit(\n",
        "        train_features,\n",
        "        train_labels,\n",
        "        epochs=length_of_data * 3,\n",
        "        validation_split=0.2,\n",
        "        callbacks=[early_stopping],\n",
        "        shuffle=False,\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    loss = model.evaluate(test_features, test_labels)\n",
        "    print(f\"Updated Test Loss: {loss}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    model.save(MODEL_PATH)\n",
        "    print(os.listdir(\".\"))\n",
        "\n",
        "    _model_loaded = load_model(MODEL_PATH)\n",
        "    print(\"Model fine-tuning is complete. Loss is at a satisfactory level.\")\n",
        "\n",
        "def load_model_and_scaler(deps: dict[str, Any]):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Load the persisted model and scaler.\"\"\"\n",
        "    load_model = deps[\"load_model\"]\n",
        "    joblib = deps[\"joblib\"]\n",
        "\n",
        "    model = load_model(MODEL_PATH)\n",
        "    scaler = joblib.load(SCALER_PATH)\n",
        "    return model, scaler\n",
        "\n",
        "def choose_uniform_random_prediction_date() -> datetime:\n",
        "    \"\"\"Pick one uniformly random date from tomorrow through the next 90 days.\"\"\"\n",
        "    random_day_offset = random.SystemRandom().randint(1, 90)\n",
        "    return datetime.now() + timedelta(days=random_day_offset)\n",
        "\n",
        "def prepare_date_features(date_obj, deps: dict[str, Any]):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Create date features with DaysLived calculated from date of birth.\"\"\"\n",
        "    pd = deps[\"pd\"]\n",
        "\n",
        "    date_obj = pd.to_datetime(date_obj)\n",
        "\n",
        "    days_lived = (\n",
        "        date_obj.normalize()\n",
        "        - pd.Timestamp(DATE_OF_BIRTH).normalize()\n",
        "    ).days\n",
        "\n",
        "    return pd.DataFrame(\n",
        "        [\n",
        "            [\n",
        "                date_obj.year,\n",
        "                date_obj.month,\n",
        "                date_obj.day,\n",
        "                date_obj.weekday(),\n",
        "                days_lived,\n",
        "            ]\n",
        "        ],\n",
        "        columns=FEATURE_COLUMNS,\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "def predict_weight_for_date(model, scaler, specific_date: str, deps: dict[str, Any]):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Predict weight for a date using the original feature preparation.\"\"\"\n",
        "    pd = deps[\"pd\"]\n",
        "\n",
        "    date_obj = pd.to_datetime(specific_date)\n",
        "    features = prepare_date_features(date_obj, deps)\n",
        "    scaled_features = scaler.transform(features)\n",
        "    return model.predict(scaled_features)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def print_weight_prediction(model, scaler, specific_date: str, deps: dict[str, Any]):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Run and print a prediction using the original output format.\"\"\"\n",
        "    predicted_weight = predict_weight_for_date(\n",
        "        model,\n",
        "        scaler,\n",
        "        specific_date,\n",
        "        deps,\n",
        "    )\n",
        "    print(\n",
        "        f\"Predicted weight for {specific_date}: \"\n",
        "        f\"{predicted_weight[0][0]:.2f} kg\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "    return predicted_weight\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def predict_target_achievement_date(model, scaler, deps: dict[str, Any]) -> None:\n",
        "    \"\"\"Iteratively predict from tomorrow until the target weight is reached.\"\"\"\n",
        "    date_obj = datetime.now() + timedelta(days=1)\n",
        "    days_elapsed = 1\n",
        "    predicted_weight = 0\n",
        "\n",
        "    while predicted_weight < TARGET_WEIGHT:\n",
        "        features = prepare_date_features(date_obj, deps)\n",
        "        scaled_features = scaler.transform(features)\n",
        "        predicted_weight = model.predict(scaled_features)[0][0]\n",
        "\n",
        "        date_obj += timedelta(days=1)\n",
        "        days_elapsed += 1\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(\n",
        "        f\"Predicted date of achieving {TARGET_WEIGHT} kg: \"\n",
        "        f\"{date_obj.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "    print(f\"Days to reach target: {days_elapsed} days\")\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def calculate_required_gain_per_day(\n",
        "    data,\n",
        "    predicted_weight,\n",
        "    specific_date: str,\n",
        "    deps: dict[str, Any],\n",
        "):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Calculate the original daily required gain value.\"\"\"\n",
        "    pd = deps[\"pd\"]\n",
        "\n",
        "    current_weight = data[\"Weight\"].iloc[0]\n",
        "    days_remaining = (\n",
        "        pd.to_datetime(specific_date)\n",
        "        - pd.to_datetime(datetime.now().strftime(\"%Y-%m-%d\"))\n",
        "    ).days\n",
        "\n",
        "    required_gain_per_day = (\n",
        "        predicted_weight[0][0] - current_weight\n",
        "    ) / days_remaining\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(f\"Required weight gain per day: {required_gain_per_day:.2f} kg\")\n",
        "    return required_gain_per_day\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def prepare_plot_data(data, predicted_weight, specific_date: str, deps: dict[str, Any]):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Prepare the historical and predicted rows exactly as in the original plot.\"\"\"\n",
        "    pd = deps[\"pd\"]\n",
        "\n",
        "    recent_90_days = data.head(89).copy()\n",
        "    recent_90_days[\"Date\"] = pd.to_datetime(recent_90_days[\"Date\"])\n",
        "\n",
        "    last_date = recent_90_days[\"Date\"].max()\n",
        "    prediction_date = last_date + pd.Timedelta(days=1)\n",
        "    predicted_weight_next_day = predicted_weight[0][0]\n",
        "\n",
        "    predicted_date = pd.to_datetime(specific_date)\n",
        "    predicted_data = pd.DataFrame(\n",
        "        {\n",
        "            \"Date\": [predicted_date],\n",
        "            \"Weight\": [predicted_weight[0][0]],\n",
        "        }\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    plot_data = pd.concat(\n",
        "        [recent_90_days, predicted_data],\n",
        "        ignore_index=True,\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(plot_data)\n",
        "    return plot_data\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def format_prediction_title_date(prediction_date: datetime) -> str:\n",
        "    \"\"\"Format the selected date for the existing plot-title sentence.\"\"\"\n",
        "    return (\n",
        "        f\"{prediction_date.strftime('%B')} \"\n",
        "        f\"{prediction_date.day}, {prediction_date.year}\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "def open_image_in_new_tab(filename: str) -> None:\n",
        "    \"\"\"Automatically open the saved PNG image in a new Colab browser tab.\"\"\"\n",
        "    import base64\n",
        "    from IPython.display import Javascript, display\n",
        "\n",
        "    with open(filename, \"rb\") as image_file:\n",
        "        encoded_image = base64.b64encode(image_file.read()).decode(\"utf-8\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    display(\n",
        "        Javascript(\n",
        "            f\"\"\"\n",
        "            const newTab = window.open(\"\", \"_blank\");\n",
        "\n",
        "            if (newTab) {{\n",
        "                newTab.document.write(`\n",
        "                    <!DOCTYPE html>\n",
        "                    <html>\n",
        "                    <head>\n",
        "                        <title>{filename}</title>\n",
        "                    </head>\n",
        "                    <body style=\"\n",
        "                        margin: 0;\n",
        "                        width: 100vw;\n",
        "                        height: 100vh;\n",
        "                        display: flex;\n",
        "                        align-items: center;\n",
        "                        justify-content: center;\n",
        "                        overflow: hidden;\n",
        "                        background: #111;\n",
        "                    \">\n",
        "                        <img\n",
        "                            src=\"data:image/png;base64,{encoded_image}\"\n",
        "                            style=\"\n",
        "                                max-height: 100vh;\n",
        "                                max-width: 100vw;\n",
        "                                width: auto;\n",
        "                                height: auto;\n",
        "                                object-fit: contain;\n",
        "                                display: block;\n",
        "                            \"\n",
        "                        >\n",
        "                    </body>\n",
        "                    </html>\n",
        "                `);\n",
        "\n",
        "                newTab.document.close();\n",
        "            }} else {{\n",
        "                alert(\n",
        "                    \"The image tab was blocked. Please allow pop-ups for Google Colab.\"\n",
        "                );\n",
        "            }}\n",
        "            \"\"\"\n",
        "        )\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "def create_and_save_plot(\n",
        "    plot_data,\n",
        "    required_gain_per_day: float,\n",
        "    prediction_date: datetime,\n",
        "    deps: dict[str, Any],\n",
        ") -> str:\n",
        "    \"\"\"Create and save the plot without changing its customized formatting.\"\"\"\n",
        "    plt = deps[\"plt\"]\n",
        "    mdates = deps[\"mdates\"]\n",
        "    patches = deps[\"patches\"]\n",
        "    mcolors = deps[\"mcolors\"]\n",
        "    cm = deps[\"cm\"]\n",
        "    sns = deps[\"sns\"]\n",
        "\n",
        "    sns.set(style=\"darkgrid\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.rcParams.update(\n",
        "        {\n",
        "            \"text.usetex\": False,\n",
        "            \"font.family\": \"serif\",\n",
        "            \"font.serif\": [\"DejaVu Serif\"],\n",
        "            \"axes.labelsize\": 18,\n",
        "            \"axes.labelpad\": 10,\n",
        "            \"axes.titlesize\": 20,\n",
        "            \"axes.titlepad\": 10,\n",
        "            \"xtick.major.size\": 8,\n",
        "            \"ytick.major.size\": 8,\n",
        "            \"xtick.labelsize\": 14,\n",
        "            \"ytick.labelsize\": 14,\n",
        "            \"legend.fontsize\": 16,\n",
        "            \"legend.frameon\": True,\n",
        "            \"lines.linewidth\": 2,\n",
        "            \"lines.markersize\": 6,\n",
        "        }\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.figure(figsize=(10, 10), dpi=500)\n",
        "\n",
        "    norm = mcolors.Normalize(\n",
        "        vmin=plot_data[\"Weight\"].min(),\n",
        "        vmax=plot_data[\"Weight\"].max(),\n",
        "    )\n",
        "    cmap = plt.get_cmap(\"coolwarm\")\n",
        "    prediction_color = cmap(norm(plot_data[\"Weight\"].iloc[-1]))\n",
        "    plt.gca().set_facecolor(prediction_color)\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.plot(\n",
        "        plot_data[\"Date\"][:-1],\n",
        "        plot_data[\"Weight\"][:-1],\n",
        "        marker=\"o\",\n",
        "        linestyle=\"-\",\n",
        "        color=\"dodgerblue\",\n",
        "        label=\"Actual Weight\",\n",
        "        linewidth=4,\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.scatter(\n",
        "        [plot_data[\"Date\"].iloc[-1]],\n",
        "        [plot_data[\"Weight\"].iloc[-1]],\n",
        "        color=\"red\",\n",
        "        s=360,\n",
        "        label=\"Predicted Weight\",\n",
        "        zorder=5,\n",
        "        edgecolors=\"black\",\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    arrow = patches.FancyArrowPatch(\n",
        "        (plot_data[\"Date\"].iloc[-2], plot_data[\"Weight\"].iloc[-2]),\n",
        "        (plot_data[\"Date\"].iloc[-1], plot_data[\"Weight\"].iloc[-1]),\n",
        "        connectionstyle=\"arc3,rad=-0.3\",\n",
        "        arrowstyle=\"fancy,head_width=8,head_length=10\",\n",
        "        color=\"magenta\",\n",
        "        mutation_scale=4.5,\n",
        "        linewidth=3,\n",
        "        zorder=1,\n",
        "    )\n",
        "    plt.gca().add_patch(arrow)\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.annotate(\n",
        "        f'{plot_data[\"Weight\"].iloc[-1]:.2f} kg',\n",
        "        xy=(plot_data[\"Date\"].iloc[-1], plot_data[\"Weight\"].iloc[-1]),\n",
        "        xytext=(-30, 0),\n",
        "        textcoords=\"offset points\",\n",
        "        fontsize=15,\n",
        "        ha=\"right\",\n",
        "        va=\"bottom\",\n",
        "        bbox=dict(\n",
        "            boxstyle=\"round,pad=0.5\",\n",
        "            facecolor=\"yellow\",\n",
        "            edgecolor=\"none\",\n",
        "            alpha=0.6,\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "        weight=\"bold\",\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    locator = mdates.AutoDateLocator()\n",
        "    plt.gca().xaxis.set_major_locator(locator)\n",
        "    plt.gca().xaxis.set_major_formatter(mdates.ConciseDateFormatter(locator))\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.text(\n",
        "        0.95,\n",
        "        0.05,\n",
        "        f\"Required Gain/Day: {required_gain_per_day:.2f} kg\",\n",
        "        transform=plt.gca().transAxes,\n",
        "        fontsize=16,\n",
        "        horizontalalignment=\"right\",\n",
        "        verticalalignment=\"bottom\",\n",
        "        bbox=dict(boxstyle=\"round\", facecolor=\"#ade6d7\", alpha=1),\n",
        "        weight=\"bold\",\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    night_target = plot_data[\"Weight\"].iloc[0] + required_gain_per_day * 2.5 * 1000\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.text(\n",
        "        0.95,\n",
        "        0.10,\n",
        "        f\"Night's Target: {night_target:.2f} g\",\n",
        "        transform=plt.gca().transAxes,\n",
        "        fontsize=16,\n",
        "        horizontalalignment=\"right\",\n",
        "        verticalalignment=\"bottom\",\n",
        "        bbox=dict(boxstyle=\"round\", facecolor=\"#E6BBAD\", alpha=1),\n",
        "        weight=\"bold\",\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Add number of records as text inside the plot\n",
        "    # plt.text(0.95, 0.15, f\"Number of Records: {len(plot_data)}\",\n",
        "    #          transform=plt.gca().transAxes, fontsize=14,\n",
        "    #          horizontalalignment='right', verticalalignment='bottom',\n",
        "    #          bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightblue', alpha=1),\n",
        "    #          weight='bold')\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
        "    plt.xlabel(\"Date\")\n",
        "    plt.ylabel(\"Weight (kg)\")\n",
        "    title_date = format_prediction_title_date(prediction_date)\n",
        "    plt.title(f\"Recent 90 Weight Records and {title_date} Prediction\")\n",
        "    plt.legend(loc=\"upper left\", prop={\"weight\": \"bold\", \"size\": 16})\n",
        "    plt.grid(True)\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "\n",
        "    max_days_lived = plot_data[\"DaysLived\"].max()\n",
        "    prediction_date_str = plot_data[\"Date\"].iloc[-1].strftime(\"%d,%b,%Y\")\n",
        "    filename = f\"{int(max_days_lived)}_{prediction_date_str}.png\"\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.savefig(filename, dpi=500)\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "    open_image_in_new_tab(filename)\n",
        "\n",
        "    return filename\n",
        "\n",
        "def main() -> None:\n",
        "    \"\"\"Run the complete original workflow in modular form.\"\"\"\n",
        "    install_required_libraries()\n",
        "    deps = import_runtime_dependencies()\n",
        "\n",
        "    data, length_of_data = load_and_preprocess_data(deps)\n",
        "    (\n",
        "        train_features,\n",
        "        test_features,\n",
        "        train_labels,\n",
        "        test_labels,\n",
        "    ) = prepare_training_data(data, deps)\n",
        "\n",
        "    model = build_model(train_features.shape[1], deps)\n",
        "    train_evaluate_and_save_model(\n",
        "        model,\n",
        "        train_features,\n",
        "        train_labels,\n",
        "        test_features,\n",
        "        test_labels,\n",
        "        length_of_data,\n",
        "        deps,\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    prediction_date = choose_uniform_random_prediction_date()\n",
        "    specific_date = prediction_date.strftime(\"%Y-%m-%d\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    model, scaler = load_model_and_scaler(deps)\n",
        "    print_weight_prediction(model, scaler, specific_date, deps)\n",
        "\n",
        "    model, scaler = load_model_and_scaler(deps)\n",
        "    predict_target_achievement_date(model, scaler, deps)\n",
        "\n",
        "    model, scaler = load_model_and_scaler(deps)\n",
        "    predicted_weight = print_weight_prediction(\n",
        "        model,\n",
        "        scaler,\n",
        "        specific_date,\n",
        "        deps,\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    required_gain_per_day = calculate_required_gain_per_day(\n",
        "        data,\n",
        "        predicted_weight,\n",
        "        specific_date,\n",
        "        deps,\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    plot_data = prepare_plot_data(\n",
        "        data,\n",
        "        predicted_weight,\n",
        "        specific_date,\n",
        "        deps,\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    create_and_save_plot(\n",
        "        plot_data,\n",
        "        required_gain_per_day,\n",
        "        prediction_date,\n",
        "        deps,\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "if __name__ == \"__main__\":\n",
        "    main()"
      ]
    }
